run --node-modules-dir: ✨Enables or disables the use of a local node_modules folder for npm packages
run --deno-modules-dir: ✨UNSTABLE: Enables or disables the use of a local deno_modules folder for remote modules
run --lock:
✨Check the specified lock file.
If value is not provided, defaults to "deno.lock" in the current working directory.
run --cert: ✨Load certificate authority from PEM encoded file
run --inspect-brk: ✨Activate inspector on host:port, wait for debugger to connect and break at the start of user script
run --inspect-wait: ✨Activate inspector on host:port and wait for debugger to connect before running user code
run --location: ✨Value of 'globalThis.location' used by some web APIs
run --watch: ✨Watch for file changes and restart automatically
run --ext: ✨Set content type of the supplied file
run --no-config: ✨Disable automatic loading of the configuration file.
run --no-lock: ✨Disable auto discovery of the lock file.
run --prompt: ✨deprecated: Fallback to prompt if required permission wasn't passed
run --no-prompt: ✨Always throw if required permission wasn't passed
run --cached-only: ✨Require that remote dependencies are already cached
run --no-clear-screen: ✨Do not clear terminal screen when under watch mode
run --enable-testing-features-do-not-use: ✨INTERNAL: Enable internal features used during integration testing

deno_core_info.--allow-read:
✨Allow file system read access. Optionally specify allowed paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-read
  --allow-read="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--deny-read:
✨Deny file system read access. Optionally specify denied paths..
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-read
  --deny-read="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--allow-write:
✨Allow file system write access. Optionally specify allowed paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-write
  --allow-write="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--deny-write:
✨Deny file system write access. Optionally specify denied paths.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-write
  --deny-write="/etc,/var/log.txt"
deno_core_info.--allow-net:
✨Allow network access. Optionally specify allowed IP addresses and host names, with ports as necessary.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-net
  --allow-net="localhost:8080,deno.land"
deno_core_info.--deny-net:
✨Deny network access. Optionally specify denied IP addresses and host names, with ports as necessary.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-net
  --deny-net="localhost:8080,deno.land"
deno_core_info.--allow-env:
✨Allow access to system environment information. Optionally specify accessible environment variables.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-env
  --allow-env="PORT,HOME,PATH"
deno_core_info.--deny-env:
✨Deny access to system environment information. Optionally specify accessible environment variables.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-env
  --deny-env="PORT,HOME,PATH"
deno_core_info.--allow-sys:
✨Allow access to OS information. Optionally allow specific APIs by function name.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-sys
  --allow-sys="systemMemoryInfo,osRelease"
deno_core_info.--deny-sys:
✨Deny access to OS information. Optionally deny specific APIs by function name.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-sys
  --deny-sys="systemMemoryInfo,osRelease"
deno_core_info.--allow-run:
✨Allow running subprocesses. Optionally specify allowed runnable program names.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-run
  --allow-run="whoami,ps"
deno_core_info.--deny-run:
✨Deny running subprocesses. Optionally specify denied runnable program names.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-run
  --deny-run="whoami,ps"
deno_core_info.--allow-ffi:
✨(Unstable) Allow loading dynamic libraries. Optionally specify allowed directories or files.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --allow-ffi  --allow-ffi="./libfoo.so"
deno_core_info.--deny-ffi:
✨(Unstable) Deny loading dynamic libraries. Optionally specify denied directories or files.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
Examples:
  --deny-ffi  --deny-ffi="./libfoo.so"
deno_core_info.--allow-hrtime:
✨Allow high-resolution time measurement. Note: this can enable timing attacks and fingerprinting.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.--deny-hrtime:
✨Deny high-resolution time measurement. Note: this can prevent timing attacks and fingerprinting.
Docs: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.-A:
✨Allow all permissions.
Learn more about permissions in Deno: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
deno_core_info.--allow-all:
✨Allow all permissions.
Learn more about permissions in Deno: https://docs.deno.com/runtime/manual/basics/permissions
